zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq.於大約1373年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI42歲，母親Margaret de Brienne33歲。他與Isabel Paveley在英國英格蘭薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq.于大约1373年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，他的父亲Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI42岁，母亲Margaret de Brienne33岁。他与Isabel Paveley在英国英格兰薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1442年在英国英格兰薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可享年70岁。

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. was born about 1373, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI, was 42 and his mother, Margaret de Brienne, was 33. He married Isabel Paveley in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1442, in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John d’Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. est né environ 1373, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John 'The White Knight' d’Erleigh, VI, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Brienne, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Paveley à Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1442, à Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. um 1373 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI 42 und seine Mutter Margaret de Brienne 33. Er hat in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Isabel Paveley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1442 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. è nato il circa 1373 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Brienne, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Paveley nel Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1442, nel Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq.が約1373年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VIは42歳，母Margaret de Brienneは33歳であった。イギリスイギリスソメルセトベクイントン ウィス スタンデルウィックでIsabel Paveleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトベクイントン ウィス スタンデルウィックで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq.(이)가 대략 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Brienne(은)는 33세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅에서 Isabel Paveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1373, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Brienne, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Paveley em Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1442, em Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. родился около 1373 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Brienne, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Paveley в местности беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1442 г. в местности беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. nació aproximadamente 1373, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret de Brienne, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Isabel Paveley en Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1442, en Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
